name: signalizeai
description: Find the right angle to sell to any company in seconds. Get clear strategy, targeting, and outreach you can actually use without guessing.

scripts.build:chrome: cp manifest.chrome.release.json manifest.json && npm run build
scripts.build:firefox: cp manifest.firefox.release.json manifest.json && npm run build
scripts.build:chrome:dev: cp manifest.chrome.dev.json manifest.json && npm run build
scripts.build:firefox:dev: cp manifest.firefox.dev.json manifest.json && npm run build
scripts.dev: cp manifest.chrome.dev.json manifest.json && concurrently -k "npm:watch" "web-ext run --chromium --source-dir . --watch-file sidepanel.html --watch-file sidepanel-loader.ts --watch-file sidepanel.css --watch-file sidepanel-partials/** --watch-file sidepanel-styles/** --watch-file extension/**"
scripts.dev:firefox: cp manifest.firefox.dev.json manifest.json && concurrently -k "npm:watch" "web-ext run --firefox --source-dir . --watch-file sidepanel.html --watch-file sidepanel-loader.ts --watch-file sidepanel.css --watch-file sidepanel-partials/** --watch-file sidepanel-styles/** --watch-file extension/**"
